project_name: GE/2026/14 — Ground Investigation, Man-made Slopes (Surface Drainage Water Study)

packages.scope_summary: Drainage field test (SR Section G): manufacture, mobilise and set up the test rig, carry out the test at each location, supply water, provide and remove freeboard, and drainage modification (demolition and channel construction), measured per the Method of Measurement.

sor_items.description: Manufacture the set up of drainage field test
Mobilise full set of drainage field test set up on land
Set up at each test location and carry out drainage field test
Purchase and supply water for drainage field test (private source or WSD)
Extra over G14 for plan distance over 300m and/or elevation over 30m
Drainage modification — demolish artificial hard material
Drainage modification — construct U-channel (Std Dwg C2409J, C2413D)

packages.scope_summary: Field installations and instrumentation for the drainage field test (SR Section H): supply, install and monitor the test instruments, with data collection and CCTV operation.

sor_items.description: Supply and install instruments and monitoring for drainage field test (2D LiDAR sensor, ultrasonic level sensor, dual-tip conductivity probe, optical camera, velocimeter, flowmeter)
Supply and install on-site instruments within HKSAR (incl. optical rain gauge)
Monitoring, data collection and data transmission
Operation and maintenance of the Closed Circuit Television (CCTV)

packages.scope_summary: Borehole televiewer / geophysical survey (SR Section J): mobilise survey equipment, carry out land resistivity multi-channel and ground penetrating radar surveys, data interpretation, and final reporting.

sor_items.description: Mobilise and demobilise geophysical survey equipment (land resistivity; ground penetrating radar)
Carry out land resistivity multi-channel survey (by measurement spacing)
Carry out ground penetrating radar survey
Extra over J6–J7 for data interpretation
Provide set of two copies of the Final Report including CD-ROM
Provide additional copies of the Final Report
